title: Creative entrepreneur & project director
content: At the helm of every music video that I have recorded. As a current founder of a non-government organisation Stellar Sound Foundation. Event and production coordinator with over 200 participants on stage.

title: Music teacher
content: A rich, international history in various teaching positions. One-on-one like piano, singing, theory and group lessong like choir, elementary, mid and high school music teacher. Has worked with the British, American, ABRSM and custom-tailored cirriculums.

title: Pianist / Keyboardist
content: Trained as a classical pianist throughout highschool and university. Has performed solo and with various bands with as highlight performing in the Burj Khalifa.

title: Web developer
content: Currently working as front-end developer. Also created or reviewed the Stellar Sound Foundation websites.

title: Creative branding and promotion
content: A recent interest towards creating independant music brought new learnings and knowledge in brand and campaign creation and execution. This trending topic is a unique puzzle that can be learned only by trial and error.
